overview.description: The Amplify CEF High Income ETF (YYY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq CEF High Income index. The fund tracks an index of US-listed closed-end funds, weighted by yield, discount to NAV, and trading volume. There are no restrictions on the assets or strategies of the underlying funds. YYY was launched on Jun 12, 2013 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
